value.mechanism: A 5-pt volume miss in Greater China lowers hardware absorption and trims Services cross-sell.
value.mitigation: Track channel inventory and regional pricing actions.

value.mechanism: A 15-20% commission reset would trim high-margin Services revenue, reduce EBITDA by roughly $4B annually, and compress the valuation multiple by 1-2 turns in the downside case.
value.ebitda_impact: ~$4B annualized EBITDA plus 1-2x multiple compression risk
value.mitigation: Watch policy scope, alternative billing adoption, and Services attach-rate resilience.

value.mechanism: If AI features stay free without raising hardware ASPs or bundle ARPU, valuation upside from ecosystem monetization fades.
value.mitigation: Monitor paid feature packaging and retention.

updates.rationale: Implements the critic-requested revenue-to-EBITDA-to-multiple chain in the App Store regulation risk.
